segment.source: An organization chart stacked as horizontal tiers from most senior downward; each tier has an optional label badge and a row of plain name-and-role cards without photos. Use it for: reporting structures, leadership and management hierarchies, board-plus-departments overviews, who-reports-to-whom sections in company documents. Prefer 'Team by Department' for grouped member grids, or 'Team Section' for a photo-led team showcase without hierarchy.
